question: The line chart shows revenue by year. Which of the following statements is most appropriate based on the chart?

options.A: Revenue increased every year shown in the chart.
options.B: Revenue in the final year shown is the same as in the previous year.
options.C: Revenue peaked in the first year and then declined.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
